name: Alcina Wormfury

sheet.name: Alcina Wormfury
sheet.background_story:
Child of Turlo who travels the forsaken lands with the burning flames of vengeance and knowledge. The magic that runs through her flesh chars the wretches who dare to defy her.
She increased her power after absorbing the soul of the otherworldly being defeated in the event of the hills between The Desecrated Valley and The Glistening Wall.

Swallowed by the abyss in The Burrows.
